titleStmt.title: SII 23.264: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 264. (A.R. No. 264 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Rājādhirājadēva I: year 32: 1050 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the praśasti of the king Tiṅgaḷēr peṟa vaḷar etc. It records a royal order issued to the dēvakarmis and other members of the establishment of Tiruviḍaimaruduḍaiyār temple, the Sabhā and the Nagarattār of Tiruviḍaimarudil, the Ūrār of Tiraimūr and lastly the agent of the king, Vikramakēsari-Vīḻupparaiyan, who had all assembled in the temple, and conveyed through (the effect that lands 7 vēli in extent had been set apart as dēvadana at Viḷanguḍi in Veṇṇāḍu. Out of this 2 vēli yielding 240 kalam of paddy per year and two house sites were to be granted in perpetuity to Araiyaṉ Tiruviḍaimaruduḍaiyāṉ alias Mummuḍiśōḻa-Nṛittappēraiyan styled the Perundanattu—Gandharvar (Court-musician ?) and his heirs, to recite the pāṭavyam in the temple. Further details regarding the disposal of the remaining portion of the dēvadāna land are not available as the inscription stops incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer peṟavaḷar Aṅkatirkkamarṭ ṭolkulam viḷaṅkat toṉṟimalikiya vaṭaticaik kaṅkaiyun teṉṟicai Ilaṅkaiyum kuṭa ticai mahotaiyum kuṇaticaik kaṭāramum
taṇṭināl koṇṭa tātai taṉ maṇṭalam veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻt taṉkuṭai niḻaṟṟat ticaitoṟuñ ceṅkolocci vicaikeḻu teṉ navaṉ mānāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyānāp parumaṇi
ppacuṉtalai poruḷakattarintu veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki kūvakattaraicaṉaic cevakantulaittu velaikeḻu kāntaḷūrccālai kala maṟuttaruḷi tutikeḻu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉneṉap puṉainta
patikeḻu kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tevarkanmikaḷ tiraimūr sabhaiyārūm tiruviṭai marutil nakarattā
rum tiraimur Ūrārum tiruṭaimarutuṭaiyār patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyap palapaṇi nivantakkāṟarum Uṭaiyārkku śrīkāriyañ cey kiṉṟa vikkiramakecari viḻupparaiyaṉum Uṭaiyār koyilile yirukka Uṭaiyār śrī
rājādhirājadevar peruntanattu kāntaṟpparil Araiyaṉ tiruviṭaimaru tuṭaiyāṉāṉa mummuṭicoḻanittapperaiyaṉukkāka Ivaṉ tamaiyaṉ Araiyaṉ tiruveṇṇavalāna coḻakulatilata nintapperaiyaṉ koṭuva
ntiṭṭa tirumukaṅ kaṇṭu talaimel vaiyttu vācitta tirumukappaṭi . koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimur nāṭṭu tiruviṭaimarutil patipātamūlappaṭṭuṭai pañcācāriyat teva kanmikaḷukkum Avvūr taṇṭuvāṉukkum
tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilil pāṭakhya ttukku muṉpu nivantammil lāmaiyil Attevarkkup pāṭaviyam vācikka nittanellu Irutūṇi yāka Araiyaṉ tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉāṉa mummuṭicoḻa nittapperai yaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkkattārkkum kāṇiyākak kuṭuttom Attevar teva
tānam veṇṇāṭṭu viḷaṅkuṭit tiṟappāy niṉṟa nilam Eḻuveliyilum nilaṅkalantavaṇṇam muṉ nellukku nilam viṭuvittukkuṭuttuk kal veṭṭikkuṭukka Ivai Apimānatuṅkaviḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟu brasātañ ceytaruḷivanta tirumukappaṭiyey tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilil pāṭavyakkāṇi Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevar peruntanattu kāntapparil Araiyaṉ tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉāṉa mummuṭicoḻa nittap peraiyaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkkattāṟkkum kāṇiyākak kuṭutta Ippāṭa pyam vācippānikku nittam nellu Irutūṇi
yāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉkalattukkut tevatā nam veṇṇāṭṭu viḷaṅkuṭiyil tiṟappāy niṉṟa nilam Eḻuveliyulum nilaṅkalantavaṇṇam kiḻaivarakuṇaṉe ṉṉum nilaṅ kālum tirukkāḷi Īśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar kuḷattil vaṭakkil nilaṅ kālum ciṟṟāṭi vāykkāliṉ Iṟai nilam Araiyum paṭṭaṉ ṟaiyili vaṭakkil nilam Araiyum marutaṉvāyil vaṭakarai nilam Araiyum Āka nilam Iru veliyum Inilattukkup paḻam viḷaṅkuṭiyil maṉaikkuk kiḻpāṟkellai teruvukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai tevar
maṉaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kiṭaṅkukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ṉa maṉaiykkut teṟkum Āka naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉaiyiraṇṭum Āka Iṉ nilam Iruveliyum Immaṉai Iraṇṭum Araiyaṉ tiruviṭaimaru tuṭaiyāṉāṉa mummuṭicoḻa nittapperaiyaṉukkumivaṉ vaṟkkat tārkkum kāṇiyākat tirumukappaṭi mutaliṭṭuk kalluveṭṭik kuṭut tom Ivvaṉaivom Innam Ivanukkey pirasātañ ceyta nivanta śrīmukappaṭi koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭ ṭut tiraimurnāṭṭut tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyārThe inscription stops here incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
